executive_summary: Autonomous red team demo: recon → exploit → C2 implant → post-exploit against Metasploitable 2 in an isolated Docker lab. Demonstrates the full kill chain including Sliver C2 deployment and persistent access.
attack_narrative: Attacker scans target ports, identifies a backdoored FTP service, exploits it for shell access, deploys a Sliver C2 implant for persistent command-and-control, then conducts post-exploitation (credential harvesting, internal recon) through the C2 channel.

kill_chain.description: Targeted port scan and service fingerprinting.
Exploit vsftpd 2.3.4 backdoor for remote shell.
Deploy Sliver HTTPS implant for persistent C2 access.
Credential harvesting and internal network recon via C2 session.

success_criteria: Shell access obtained via exploited service
Sliver C2 implant deployed and active session established
Credentials harvested from compromised host via C2
Internal network enumerated from compromised host
